evals.prompt: Build an MCP server that provides tools for managing a PostgreSQL database: list_tables, describe_table(name), run_query(sql), and create_migration(name, sql). Use TypeScript with @modelcontextprotocol/sdk.
evals.expected_output: MCP server with 4 tools, proper parameter validation, error handling, and stdio transport

assertions.name: four_tools
assertions.description: All 4 tools defined with proper schemas

assertions.name: parameter_validation
assertions.description: Tool parameters use Zod schemas with descriptions

assertions.name: error_handling
assertions.description: Try/catch with isError returns on tool failures

assertions.name: stdio_transport
assertions.description: Uses stdio transport for Claude Code integration

assertions.name: no_console_log
assertions.description: No console.log in stdio transport (breaks protocol)

evals.prompt: Create an MCP server that wraps our internal REST API. Tools: get_users(filter?), create_user(data), update_user(id, data), delete_user(id). The API requires an API key in the Authorization header.
evals.expected_output: MCP server wrapping REST API with auth, proper tool definitions, and typed responses

assertions.name: crud_tools
assertions.description: All 4 CRUD tools defined

assertions.name: api_key_auth
assertions.description: API key read from env var, added to requests

assertions.name: typed_responses
assertions.description: Tool responses have structured content

assertions.name: error_handling
assertions.description: HTTP errors converted to MCP error responses

assertions.name: zod_schemas
assertions.description: Input parameters validated with Zod

evals.prompt: Build an MCP server for file operations: read_file(path), write_file(path, content), list_directory(path), and search_files(pattern, directory). Include path safety checks to prevent directory traversal.
evals.expected_output: File operation MCP server with path validation preventing traversal attacks

assertions.name: four_tools
assertions.description: read, write, list, search tools defined

assertions.name: path_safety
assertions.description: Validates paths to prevent directory traversal (../)

assertions.name: sandboxed_root
assertions.description: Operations confined to a configurable root directory

assertions.name: error_handling
assertions.description: File not found, permission denied handled gracefully

assertions.name: search_tool
assertions.description: Search uses glob or regex pattern matching

evals.prompt: Create an MCP server with both tools and resources. Tools: create_note(title, content), list_notes. Resources: notes:///{id} for reading individual notes. Use in-memory storage.
evals.expected_output: MCP server with tools for mutations and resources for reads

assertions.name: tools_defined
assertions.description: create_note and list_notes tools present

assertions.name: resources_defined
assertions.description: Resource template for notes:///{id}

assertions.name: tool_resource_separation
assertions.description: Mutations via tools, reads via resources

assertions.name: in_memory_store
assertions.description: Notes stored in memory (Map or array)

assertions.name: resource_listing
assertions.description: Resources listable for discovery

evals.prompt: Set up an MCP server in our project's .mcp.json config. The server is at packages/mcp-server/dist/index.js, uses stdio transport, and needs DATABASE_URL and API_KEY environment variables.
evals.expected_output: mcp.json configuration with server entry, env vars, and build instructions

assertions.name: mcp_json
assertions.description: .mcp.json with server configuration

assertions.name: stdio_transport
assertions.description: Transport set to stdio

assertions.name: env_vars
assertions.description: DATABASE_URL and API_KEY configured

assertions.name: build_path
assertions.description: Points to compiled dist/index.js

assertions.name: build_instructions
assertions.description: Documents how to build the MCP server before use
